name: taevas-plugins
description: Taevas Plugins Marketplace - Collection of plugins for Claude Code including blackbox observability guide and wendao deep inquiry system.

plugins.name: sound-hooks
plugins.description: Sound notification hooks for Claude Code task events. Get audio feedback when tasks are created, completed, or when commands execute.

plugins.name: hugo
plugins.description: Publish content to Hugo blog. Use when user invokes /hugo command to create new blog posts.

plugins.name: wendao
plugins.description: 四层深度追问体系（道・法・术・行）。用于扩充认知、结构化提问、跨领域知识迁移。当用户需要：深入理解某事物本质、从特例提炼通用规律、进行类比推理、系统化梳理知识时使用。

plugins.name: blackbox
plugins.description: 记录理念设计指南。帮助理解「记什么、怎么记」，指导埋点方案设计，可通过 OpenTelemetry/日志/APM 工具/自定义等多种方式实现。
